entities.firetruck: a bright red toy fire truck

scenes.title: The Toy Store
scenes.background_prompt: A toy store aisle with shelves of toys, a tiled floor, bright fluorescent lighting, and a checkout counter at the far end. No people, no toys on the main display.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A brightly lit toy store aisle. On a wooden shelf at eye level, a bright red toy fire truck with a shiny chrome ladder and small rubber wheels sits prominently in the center, surrounded by other toys in duller packaging — a beige teddy bear box, a gray robot kit, and a white puzzle box. A boy of about seven in a green jacket stands in front of the shelf, pointing at the red fire truck with wide excited eyes. A store clerk in a blue polo shirt and khaki pants stands at the end of the aisle near the checkout counter, organizing boxes. The shelves stretch upward filled with colorful toy packaging, and the tiled floor reflects the fluorescent ceiling lights.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place firetruck on the wooden shelf (center), bright red with shiny chrome ladder. Place boy in front of the shelf, standing and pointing at the fire truck with wide eyes. Place clerk at the end of the aisle near checkout, standing and organizing boxes.
scenes.scene_description: In the left foreground of this indoor shop, a large, light-brown wooden bookshelf with three empty shelves stands prominently, its side panel curving at the top. To its right is a connected wooden shelving unit where a red firetruck toy with a silver ladder and black wheels sits on the top shelf. Behind these shelves, large floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a background of rounded green trees and bushes under a light blue sky with soft white clouds. In the center of the room, a young boy with short brown hair, a green t-shirt, brown cargo shorts, yellow socks, and blue sneakers stands on a floor made of large tan and light-brown tiles. He is smiling and pointing his right hand toward the firetruck. To the right of the boy, a clerk with brown hair tied in a bun, wearing a tan shirt and a dark brown apron, stands behind a curved wooden counter. She is smiling while handling a stack of small tan and green boxes. On the counter to her left is a grey cash register. Beside the counter is a grey metal rolling cart holding several more boxes in brown, blue, green, and purple. Behind the clerk, large windows show a grassy hill dotted with small white and yellow flowers under the same blue, cloudy sky. Above the entire scene, the ceiling is made of white tiles and features two long, glowing, rectangular light fixtures with rounded ends that angle toward the center of the room.

a smiling clerk with a hair bun

the clerk is stacking small boxes on the counter
